message:
data(beads,audit): sync issue tracker state and append audit index entries

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated status for beads progressed during the
  worker channel terminal-state poll review, region heap drop ordering
  audit, and BufferedSink fairness analysis
- audit_index.jsonl: new audit trail entries capturing the
  GaussianSolver bounds-check audit, runtime fallback reason boundary
  verification, browser-core fetch abort review, and worker channel
  terminal-state semantic review

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
